Project NAMPHU — Strictly Private & Confidential — Embargoed until 18 July 2026, 17:00 ICT; not for SET/SEC public release.
Term Sheet (Non-Binding) for strategic share acquisition and bridge financing between Riverlotus Energy Public Company Limited (SET-listed, Thailand) and Orchid Delta Holdings Pte. Ltd. (Singapore) (both fictional).
Transaction: Buyer to acquire 28.5% of Riverlotus via secondary purchase and subscribe to THB 1,200,000,000 unsecured bridge notes; proceeds to refinance working capital and fund solar EPC backlog.
Economics: Purchase price THB 7.90 per share; implied pre-money equity value approx. THB 9,800,000,000; bridge coupon 9.25% p.a., maturity 12 months with 2% OID.
Approvals/Regulatory: Thai SEC tender offer exemption (whitewash) confirmation, SET approval for issuance, Board and shareholder approvals under the Public Limited Companies Act.
Definitive Agreements: Share Purchase Agreement (SPA), Share Subscription Agreement (SSA), Intercreditor Agreement, and Shareholders’ Agreement; long-stop date 30 September 2026.
MAC/MAE: routine seasonal revenue fluctuations and announced policy tariff reviews shall not constitute a Material Adverse Change.
Board memo — draft for 12 July 2026 meeting; distribution limited to directors and counsel under PDPA-compliant NDA; internal file ref: RL-2026-ACQ.
Employment/Retention: retention grants for Khun Narin Phasuk (CEO) and Ms. Mali Wattan to be documented in side letters; no change-in-control severance payable.
Cross-border funds flow: USD tranche to Chao Phraya Escrow Co., Ltd. (fictional) with offshore/onshore split 60/40; FX hedging via Banyan Capital Bank (fictional).
Public source note: the Ministry of Energy’s 2019 PDP draft (publicly available) indicated solar quota expansions; this reference is non-proprietary.
IR draft Q&A (not for posting): anticipated pro forma net debt/EBITDA ~3.1x; no dividend policy change expected in 2H26; subject to final audit.
Internal research note: estimated EPS accretion 6–8% in FY27 from cost synergies and interest savings; sensitivity ±1% on tariff and ±50bps on base rates.
Interim covenants: no new liens > THB 100,000,000; capex cap THB 300,000,000 per quarter; negative pledge; no related-party transactions without Audit Committee approval.
Contacts: Khun Preecha Sornchai (Chairman) and Ms. Kanya Rueang; email: dealroom@riverlotus-energy.co.th; secure channel: +66-2010-8899 (fictional).
Notes: unauthorized disclosure may breach the SEA and PDPA; embargo lifts upon SET filing of SPA signing; friday team spa-day vouchers at Blue Lotus Onsen are HR-only and non-material.
